summary: Frontend testing for Strategy Marketplace UI - All 12 features tested and PASSED. The three new pages (/strategy-marketplace, /strategy-marketplace/:id, /my-strategies) are fully functional with proper data-testid attributes, correct UI behavior, and working backend integration.
critical_code_review_comments: All three marketplace pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Performance metrics display correctly with Sharpe Ratio, Win Rate, Max Drawdown, Total Return, Total Trades
Review form correctly shows only for logged-in non-owner users
Subscribe/Unsubscribe flow works correctly with proper state management
Category filter correctly filters strategies by category
Create strategy form creates draft strategies that can be published/unpublished
seed_data_creation: Created 'Test Strategy from Playwright' strategy during testing (draft status)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Strategy Marketplace UI fully tested. 4 published strategies exist in DB (BTC Momentum Alpha, ETH Scalping Bot, SOL Trend Follower, Multi-Asset Arbitrage) created by Free user. Pro user (demo_test2) has reviewed BTC Momentum Alpha and ETH Scalping Bot. A test strategy 'Test Strategy from Playwright' was created during testing in draft status.

tests_executed.test: /strategy-marketplace page loads and shows 4 published strategy cards
tests_executed.details: 4 strategy cards displayed with '4 published' badge

tests_executed.test: Category filter dropdown changes results on /strategy-marketplace
tests_executed.details: BTC filter shows 1 strategy, ETH filter shows 1 strategy, SOL filter shows 1 strategy, reset to All shows 4

tests_executed.test: Clicking a strategy card navigates to /strategy-marketplace/:id detail page
tests_executed.details: Navigation works correctly with proper URL containing strategy UUID

tests_executed.test: Strategy detail page shows name, category, creator, description, performance metrics
tests_executed.details: BTC Momentum Alpha shows: Sharpe Ratio 2.14, Win Rate 68.3%, Max Drawdown -4.2%, Total Return 34.5%, Total Trades 120

tests_executed.test: Subscribe button works for logged-in Pro user on strategy detail page
tests_executed.details: Subscribe button visible and functional, changes to Unsubscribe after clicking

tests_executed.test: Unsubscribe button appears after subscribing and works
tests_executed.details: Unsubscribe button appears after subscribe, clicking it returns to Subscribe button

tests_executed.test: Review form appears for logged-in non-owner users; submitting a review shows success toast
tests_executed.details: Review form visible for Pro user on ETH Scalping Bot, submitted review with 4 stars, 'Review submitted!' toast shown

tests_executed.test: /my-strategies page loads when logged in and shows Subscribed/Created tabs
tests_executed.details: Both tabs visible with correct counts (Subscribed: 0, Created: 4 for Free user)

tests_executed.test: Created tab shows strategies created by the logged-in user with Publish/Unpublish buttons
tests_executed.details: 4 created strategies shown with Unpublish buttons (all published)

tests_executed.test: Create form on /my-strategies creates a new draft strategy
tests_executed.details: Created 'Test Strategy from Playwright' with momentum category, shows in Created tab with draft status

tests_executed.test: Publish button on created strategy changes its status
tests_executed.details: Publish button clicked, strategy published, Unpublish button appeared, then unpublished back to draft

tests_executed.test: 'My Strategies' link appears on marketplace when logged in
tests_executed.details: Link visible when logged in, not visible when logged out

notes: WebSocket connection warnings for alerts are expected behavior (non-critical)
All data-testid attributes are properly implemented and functional
Review form correctly hidden for non-logged-in users and strategy owners
